Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 206 

POST_OOPT_COINS_PCT 

LABEL: Post-Out-of-Pocket Threshold Coinsurance Percentage 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the co-insurance percentage that drugs on the tier are subject to during the 
post out-of-pocket threshold (catastrophic) phase of the Part D benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is only
